summary: Completed testing of Ahsay CBS Backup Integration. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend Backups page and NOC Display Reminders view verified working correctly with Ahsay data.
passed_tests: GET /api/backups/ahsay/status returns 200 with valid auth
Ahsay response contains users array with 16 users
Ahsay response contains summary object with all required fields
Ahsay summary shows total_users=16, successful=12, warning=1, stale=3, health_rate=75.0
Ahsay response contains stale_users array with 3 stale users
Stale users have required fields: login_name, alias, last_backup, age_hours
Each user has required fields: login_name, alias, status, client_type, backup_status, etc.
backup_status values are valid (success, warning, stale, never)
Response has fetched_at timestamp
Response has from_cache boolean flag
GET /api/backups/altaro/status still works (existing integration not broken)
Altaro response has summary and customers array
Ahsay endpoint requires authentication (returns 403 without token)
Altaro endpoint requires authentication (returns 403 without token)
Ahsay data is cached in MongoDB ahsay_cache collection
Backups page has 3 tabs: Altaro Live Status, Ahsay CBS Status, Manual Logs
Ahsay CBS Status tab shows summary cards: 16 Total Users, 12 Healthy, 1 Warning, 3 Stale, 1906.96 GB Total Data, 75% Health Rate
Ahsay CBS Status tab shows Stale Backups alert with 3 users
Ahsay user table has columns: User, Type, Status, Last Backup, Data Size, Quota Used, Online
Ahsay user table shows 16 user rows with correct data
Refresh Ahsay button works and refetches data
NOC Display Reminders view shows both Altaro and Ahsay backup panels
NOC Ahsay panel shows: 12 Healthy, 3 Stale, 1906.96 GB Total Data, 75% Health Rate
NOC Ahsay panel shows Stale Backups section with user list
critical_code_review_comments: Ahsay CBS integration properly implemented with live API calls to cloudbackup.synthesis-it.co.uk
Backend correctly handles self-signed certificate with verify=False
Data caching in MongoDB ahsay_cache collection working correctly
Frontend Backups.jsx properly fetches and displays Ahsay data with all required columns
NOC Display correctly shows both Altaro and Ahsay panels in Reminders view
Stale backup detection working correctly (>72 hours threshold)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_ahsay_integration.py - Created new test file for Ahsay integration
seed_data_creation: None - using live Ahsay CBS API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ahsay CBS integration fully tested and working. Backend endpoint GET /api/backups/ahsay/status returns live data from cloudbackup.synthesis-it.co.uk with 16 backup users. Frontend Backups page at /backups has 3 tabs (Altaro, Ahsay, Manual). Ahsay tab shows summary stats, stale backups alert, and user table. NOC Display at /display Reminders view shows both Altaro and Ahsay backup panels with stats. Data is cached in MongoDB ahsay_cache collection. Login: admin@test.com / Test123!
